Class GamePane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
tailFinder.view.game.GamePane
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class GamePane extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
Main game view pane containing the game world visualization and debug/command overlays. Extends JavaFX StackPane to layer multiple components. Manages visibility of debug panel (F3 toggle), command panel (ENTER toggle), and win/loss alerts.

  • Field Details

    • visibleGridBlock

      private static VisibleGridBlock visibleGridBlock

    • visibleGridEntity

      private static VisibleGridSteve visibleGridEntity

      private static boolean win

  • Constructor Details

    • GamePane

      public GamePane()
      Initializes the GamePane with game world visualization and UI overlays. Creates VisibleGridBlock for the map, VisibleGridSteve for the player, and initializes debug/command panels and win alert. Default size is 1500x900 pixels with light blue background.

  • Method Details

    • toggleF3

      public static void toggleF3()
      Toggles the debug panel visibility (F3 key functionality). Displays game information like player position, world time, and other debug data.

    • updateDebugIfVisible

      public static void updateDebugIfVisible()
      Updates the debug panel content if it is currently visible. Called frequently by the game loop to refresh displayed information.

    • toggleCommand

      public static void toggleCommand()
      Toggles the command input panel visibility (ENTER key functionality). Allows player to input debug commands during gameplay.

    • toggleWin

      public static void toggleWin()
      Toggles the win/loss alert visibility. Shows the alert when the player wins or loses the game.

    • getRefreshable

      public static Refreshable getRefreshable()
      Gets the Refreshable instance for the game world grid.
      Returns:
      the VisibleGridBlock which implements Refreshable

    • getVisibleGridBlock

      public static VisibleGridBlock getVisibleGridBlock()
      Gets the VisibleGridBlock instance for the game world.
      Returns:
      the VisibleGridBlock rendering the map

    • setVisibleGridBlock

      public static void setVisibleGridBlock(VisibleGridBlock visibleGridBlock)
      Sets the VisibleGridBlock instance.
      Parameters:
      visibleGridBlock - the new VisibleGridBlock

    • getVisibleGridEntity

      public static VisibleGridSteve getVisibleGridEntity()
      Gets the VisibleGridSteve instance for the player character.
      Returns:
      the VisibleGridSteve rendering the player

    • setVisibleGridEntity

      public static void setVisibleGridEntity(VisibleGridSteve visibleGridEntity)
      Sets the VisibleGridSteve instance.
      Parameters:
      visibleGridEntity - the new VisibleGridSteve

    • isCommand

      public static boolean isCommand()
      Checks if the command input panel is currently active.
      Returns:
      true if command panel is visible, false otherwise
